RECALL_POWER.title: Remember
RECALL_POWER.description: At the start of next turn, return the recalled card to your hand and give it Retain.
STARLIT_SEA_POWER.title: Starlit Sea
STARLIT_SEA_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, you may add 1 card from the exhaust pile to your hand and draw a number of cards equal to the stacks.
TIRED_POWER.title: Tired
TIRED_POWER.description: At the start of next turn, lose energy equal to the stacks.
PRINCESS_POWER.title: Princess
PRINCESS_POWER.description: Whenever you play 8 cards in a turn, gain 3 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 3 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
TRANSIENT_SYMPHONY_POWER.title: Transient Symphony
TRANSIENT_SYMPHONY_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] cards in your [gold]hand[/gold] and give them [gold]Ethereal[/gold] next turn.
TRANSIENT_SYMPHONY_POWER.selectionScreen: Select cards to retain and give Ethereal
MELT_POWER.title: Melt
MELT_POWER.description: Gain 1 additional energy and draw 1 card each turn.
REALITY.title: Reality
REALITY.description:
Draw 1 additional card each turn.
Whenever you play the first card in a turn, gain 1 [gold]Overwork[/gold] (resets when entering Reality again). Upon exiting this state, gain 1 energy.
REALITY.smartDescription:
Draw 1 additional card each turn.
Whenever you play the first card in a turn, gain 1 [gold]Overwork[/gold]. Upon exiting this state, gain 1 energy.
TSUKUYOMI.title: Tsukuyomi
TSUKUYOMI.description: Upon entering, remove 3 [gold]Overwork[/gold] and gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Upon exiting, draw 1 card and gain 1 [gold]Overwork[/gold].
TSUKUYOMI.smartDescription: Upon entering [gold]Tsukuyomi[/gold], remove 3 [gold]Overwork[/gold] and gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Upon exiting, draw 1 card and gain 1 [gold]Overwork[/gold].
OVERWORK.title: Overwork
OVERWORK.description: When stacks reach 6, lose 6 [gold]Overwork[/gold] and end your turn.
OVERWORK.smartDescription: When stacks reach 6, lose 6 [gold]Overwork[/gold] and end your turn.
KAGUYA-CREATION_POWER.title: Creation
KAGUYA-CREATION_POWER.description:
When reaching 10 stacks, gain 2 energy.
Then, based on the last card you played, add a random [gold]Song[/gold] to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-MODEL_STUDENT_POWER.title: Model Student
KAGUYA-MODEL_STUDENT_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, add a random Skill card to your hand and make it cost 0 this turn.
KAGUYA-MODEL_STUDENT_POWER.smartDescript: At the start of each turn, add {Amount} random [gold]Skill[/gold] cards to your hand, and they cost [gold]0[/gold] this turn.
KAGUYA-TAKETORI_MONOGATARI_POWER.title: Taketori Monogatari
KAGUYA-TAKETORI_MONOGATARI_POWER.descrip: At the start of each turn, add a random [gold]Partner[/gold] card to your hand, give it [gold]Ethereal[/gold], and it costs [gold]0[/gold] this turn.
KAGUYA-TSUKUYOMI_FORM_POWER.title: Tsukuyomi Form
KAGUYA-TSUKUYOMI_FORM_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, exit your current stance and enter [gold]Tsukuyomi[/gold].
KAGUYA-SCHEDULE_POWER.title: Schedule
KAGUYA-SCHEDULE_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, gain equal energy, draw equal cards, and lose 1 Overwork.
KAGUYA-CHAIN_TRICK_POWER.title: Chain Trick
KAGUYA-CHAIN_TRICK_POWER.description: Deal damage to ALL enemies for each card drawn this turn.
KAGUYA-OVERDRAW_BODY_POWER.title: Overdraw Body
KAGUYA-OVERDRAW_BODY_POWER.description: Whenever you gain Overwork, draw 1 card.
KAGUYA-PREPARATION_FOR_PERFORMANCE_POWER: Whenever you play 2 cards, gain 1 Creation.
KAGUYA-PREPARATORY_STANCE_POWER.title: Preparatory Stance
KAGUYA-PREPARATORY_STANCE_POWER.descript: Your next Attack this turn will be played twice.
KAGUYA-ROPE_TRAP_POWER.title: Rope Trap
KAGUYA-ROPE_TRAP_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card, apply Weak and Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
KAGUYA-BEST_PARTNER_POWER.title: Best Partner
KAGUYA-BEST_PARTNER_POWER.description: Whenever you play a Partner card, draw a number of cards equal to the stacks.
KAGUYA-SURPRISE_PERFORMANCE_POWER.title: Surprise Performance
KAGUYA-SURPRISE_PERFORMANCE_POWER.descri: At the start of next turn, gain Creation.
KAGUYA-COMPOSE_POWER.title: Compose
KAGUYA-COMPOSE_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, gain equal Creation.
KAGUYA-BATTLE_START_POWER.title: Battle Start
KAGUYA-BATTLE_START_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, all characters gain equal Strength.
KAGUYA-COMPUTER_ROOM_POWER.title: Computer Room
KAGUYA-COMPUTER_ROOM_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, gain Overwork, draw a card, and exhaust a card from your hand.
KAGUYA-LIVE_PERFORMANCE_POWER.title: Live Performance
KAGUYA-LIVE_PERFORMANCE_POWER.descriptio: Remove Overwork. The Song cards you Create are upgraded, and the first Song each turn costs 0.
KAGUYA-FUTURE_PLAN_POWER.title: Future Plan
KAGUYA-FUTURE_PLAN_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, add a random 0-cost card to your hand.
KAGUYA-KURAKAWA_HIGH_SCHOOL_POWER.title: Kurakawa High School
KAGUYA-KURAKAWA_HIGH_SCHOOL_POWER.descri: Your first Partner card each turn costs 0.
KAGUYA-KURAKAWA_HIGH_SCHOOL_POWER.smartD: The first {Amount} Partner card(s) each turn cost 0.
KAGUYA-THIS_NIGHT_IS_ALSO_ETERNAL_TEMP_P: Enter Reality at the end of your turn.
KAGUYA-KAGUYA_NO_ENERGY.title: Three Rules
KAGUYA-LIMIT_BREAK_POWER.title: Limit Release
KAGUYA-LIMIT_BREAK_POWER.description: Double all attack damage you deal and Block you gain from cards. Die after 3 turns.
KAGUYA-NAIL_ART_NEXT_ATTACK_POWER.title: Nail Art (Ready)
KAGUYA-NAIL_ART_NEXT_ATTACK_POWER.descri: Your next Attack costs 1 less energy.
KAGUYA-THORN_TRAP_POWER.title: Binding Trap
KAGUYA-THORN_TRAP_POWER.description: Take [red]3[/red] damage for each card you play this turn.
KAGUYA-THORN_TRAP_POWER.smartDescription: Take [red]3[/red] damage for each card you play this turn.
KAGUYA-BACKLASH_TRAP_POWER.title: Landmine Trap
KAGUYA-BACKLASH_TRAP_POWER.description: The first Attack you play this turn deals [red]12[/red] damage to you.
KAGUYA-BACKLASH_TRAP_POWER.smartDescript: The first Attack you play this turn deals [red]12[/red] damage to you.
KAGUYA-CHAOTIC_SOUND_POWER.title: Chaotic Sound
KAGUYA-CHAOTIC_SOUND_POWER.description: Take 3 damage for each card you play.
KAGUYA-CHAOTIC_SOUND_POWER.smartDescript: Take [red]3[/red] damage for each card you play.
KAGUYA-PHASE_TRANSITION_POWER.title: Tsukito
KAGUYA-SANDFIELD_HEROISM_POWER.title: Battlefield Heroism
KAGUYA-SANDFIELD_HEROISM_POWER.descripti: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, gain {Amount} Strength.
KAGUYA-SANDFIELD_HEROISM_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, gain [red]{Amount}[/red] Strength.
KAGUYA-GONG_NOISE_POWER.title: Gong Noise
KAGUYA-GONG_NOISE_POWER.description: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, add 1 Dazed to each player's [gold]draw pile[/gold] and [gold]discard pile[/gold].
KAGUYA-GONG_NOISE_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you deal unblocked damage, add 1 [gold]Dazed[/gold] to each player's [gold]draw pile[/gold] and [gold]discard pile[/gold].
KAGUYA-VAJRA_POWER.title: Vajra
KAGUYA-VAJRA_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, gain 8 Plated Armor.
KAGUYA-VAJRA_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, gain [gold]Plated Armor[/gold].
KAGUYA-UNBREAKABLE_POWER.title: Unbreakable
KAGUYA-UNBREAKABLE_POWER.description: Take at most {Amount} damage each turn.
KAGUYA-UNBREAKABLE_POWER.smartDescriptio: Take at most [gold]{Amount}[/gold] damage each turn.
KAGUYA-HIGH_DIMENSIONAL_BEING_POWER.desc: Negate negative effects equal to the stacks.
KAGUYA-GLUTTONY_POWER.title: Gluttony
KAGUYA-GLUTTONY_POWER.description: Whenever you play 5 cards, exhaust 1 random card from your hand.
KAGUYA-GLUTTONY_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play [red]6[/red] cards, [gold]exhaust[/gold] 1 random card from your hand.
KAGUYA-EXCITED_POWER.title: Excited
KAGUYA-EXCITED_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, gain 2 Strength and 2 Dexterity.
KAGUYA-EXCITED_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of each turn, gain [red]2[/red] Strength and [blue]2[/blue] Dexterity.
KAGUYA-FAIR_DUEL_POWER.title: Fair Duel
KAGUYA-FAIR_DUEL_POWER.description: When you would die, heal to 100% of your Max HP. Remaining uses: {Amount}
KAGUYA-FAIR_DUEL_POWER.smartDescription:
When you would die, heal to [green]100%[/green] of your Max HP.
Remaining uses: [gold]{Amount}[/gold]
KAGUYA-CHAOTIC_SOUND_POWER_V2.title: Chaotic Sound
KAGUYA-CHAOTIC_SOUND_POWER_V2.descriptio: Take 3 damage for each card you draw this turn.
KAGUYA-CHAOTIC_SOUND_POWER_V2.smartDescr: Take [red]3[/red] damage for each card you draw this turn.
KAGUYA-BOSATSU_PHASE_TRANSITION_POWER.sm:
Ruler of the extraterrestrial beings. Each [gold]Buff[/gold] intent gives all enemies 3 [gold]Strength[/gold].
Defeating her minions might [gold]weaken[/gold] her?
KAGUYA-VAJRA_ALL_POWER.title: Vajra
KAGUYA-VAJRA_ALL_POWER.description: At the end of each turn, all monsters gain 25 Plated Armor.
KAGUYA-VAJRA_ALL_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of each turn, all monsters gain [gold]25[/gold] Plated Armor.
KAGUYA-OPPRESSIVE_PRESSURE_POWER.title: Oppressive Pressure
KAGUYA-OPPRESSIVE_PRESSURE_POWER.descrip: Whenever you play 25 cards in the same turn, end your turn.
KAGUYA-OPPRESSIVE_PRESSURE_POWER.smartDe: Whenever you play [red]30[/red] cards in the same turn, end your turn.
KAGUYA-NEVER_GIVE_UP_POWER.title: Longing
KAGUYA-NEVER_GIVE_UP_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, add a random card to your hand.
KAGUYA-NEVER_GIVE_UP_POWER.smartDescript: At the start of each turn, add a random card to your [gold]hand[/gold].
KAGUYA-GOOD_ENDING_POWER.title: Good Ending
KAGUYA-INSPIRATION_POWER.title: Inspiration
KAGUYA-INSPIRATION-POWER.description: Whenever this monster [gold]Buffs[/gold], give all enemies 2 [gold]Strength[/gold].
KAGUYA-INSPIRATION_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever this monster [gold]Buffs[/gold], give all enemies 2 [gold]Strength[/gold] and 2 [gold]Regeneration[/gold].
KAGUYA-DETERMINATION_POWER.title: Determination
KAGUYA-DETERMINATION_POWER.description: Your next Attack deals double damage.
KAGUYA-TURN_COUNTER_POWER.title: End Timer
KAGUYA-TURN_COUNTER_POWER.description:
When the timer reaches [red]7[/red], end your life and reset all your [gold]powers[/gold].
Defeating Tsukito minions might delay it?
KAGUYA-TURN_COUNTER_POWER.smartDescripti:
When the timer reaches [red]7[/red], end your life and reset all your [gold]powers[/gold].

KAGUYA-FORTUNE_POWER.title: Moonlight
KAGUYA-FORTUNE_POWER.description: Gain a special buff that provides additional benefits to certain cards.
KAGUYA-FORTUNE_POWER.smartDescription: Moonlight accumulates, eventually becoming the final movement.
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_TIME_POWER.title: Moon Sights
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_TIME_POWER.description: Eight thousand years of longing. Each time you gain 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold], gain an equal amount × 80 [gold]Moon Sights[/gold]. Upon reaching certain thresholds, add the corresponding Status card to your [gold]draw pile[/gold]. Upon reaching 8000, gain [gold]Moon View Stance[/gold].
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_TIME_POWER.smartDescripti: Each time you gain 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold], gain an equal amount × 80 [gold]Moon Sights[/gold]. Upon reaching cumulative thresholds, add the corresponding Status card to your [gold]draw pile[/gold]. Upon reaching 8000, unlock [gold]Moon View Stance[/gold].
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_ATTACK_POWER.title: Attack Support
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_ATTACK_POWER.description: The next Attack you play this turn costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less.
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_ATTACK_POWER.smartDescrip: Your next [gold]Attack[/gold] this turn costs 1 less.
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_SKILL_POWER.title: Skill Support

KAGUYA-SUPPORT_SKILL_POWER.smartDescript: Your next [blue]Skill[/blue] this turn costs 1 less.
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_CONTRACT_POWER.title: Climax
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_CONTRACT_POWER.descriptio: Each time you play a card this turn, gain 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_CONTRACT_POWER.smartDescr: Each time you play a card this turn, gain 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_BLESSING_POWER.title: Moon View Stance
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_BLESSING_POWER.descriptio: Yachiyo Form. At the start of each combat, heal 5% of your Max HP. At the start of each turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw 1 card.
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_BLESSING_POWER.smartDescr: At the start of combat, heal 5% of your Max HP. At the start of each turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and draw 1 card.
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_STRIKE_AURA_POWER.title: Coordinated Ops
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_STRIKE_AURA_POWER.descrip: Each time you play a Skill card this turn, add 1 [blue]Support Strike[/blue] to your hand.
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_STRIKE_AURA_POWER.smartDe: Each time you play a [blue]Skill[/blue] card this turn, add 1 [blue]Support Strike[/blue] to your hand.

KAGUYA-GROWTH_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-GROWTH_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, gain 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_BLOCK_POWER.title: Moon Gate
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_BLOCK_POWER.description: Each time you consume 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold], gain 2 Block.
KAGUYA-MOONLIGHT_BLOCK_POWER.smartDescri: Each time you consume 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold], gain {Amount} Block.
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_AURA_POWER.title: Weapon Swap
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_AURA_POWER.description: Each time you play a [blue]Support[/blue] Attack card, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold]. Each time you play a [blue]Support[/blue] Skill card, gain 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_FORM_POWER.title: Celestial Form
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_FORM_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, gain 2 [gold]Moonlight[/gold]. At the start of your turn, consume 2 [gold]Moonlight[/gold] to gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}; if [gold]Moonlight[/gold] ≥ 10, gain an additional {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.

KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_DRAW_BUFF.title: Starlit Brilliance
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_DRAW_BUFF.description: Whenever you draw a card, gain 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].
KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_DRAW_BUFF.smartDescriptio: Whenever you draw a card, gain 1 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].

KAGUYA-TSUKIMI_ROBE_BUFF.smartDescriptio: At the end of your turn, gain {Amount} Block for each [gold]Moonlight[/gold] you have.

KAGUYA-SINGER_MOON_AO_E_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you gain or consume [gold]Moonlight[/gold], deal 3 damage to ALL enemies.

KAGUYA-SUPPORT_FORGE_POWER.description: Cards you obtain this combat are [gold]upgraded[/gold].
KAGUYA-SUPPORT_FORGE_POWER.smartDescript: Cards you obtain this combat are [gold]upgraded[/gold].

KAGUYA-SINGER_CONVERT_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of each turn, add one [gold]Performance[/gold] to your hand.
KAGUYA-FORTUNE_GUARD_POWER.title: Piece of Cake

KAGUYA-FORTUNE_GUARD_POWER.smartDescript: At the start of your turn, if you took no unblocked damage last turn, gain 5 [gold]Moonlight[/gold].

KAGUYA-STAR_NIGHT_POWER.title: Sound-Seeking
